case_title: EBE F. SAPONE et al VS. SANGKYU PARK et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAPONE, EBE F. AS CO-TRUSTEE OF THE SAPONE FAMILY TRUST CAVAGNARO, ALFRED C. AS CO-TRUSTEE OF THE SAPONE FAMILY TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARK, SANGKYU INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA AS CAFE FOR ALL SEASONS PARK, SEUNHEE INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA AS CAFE FOR ALL SEASONS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 150 WEST PORTAL AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94127, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
